serious attention.


The year is going to mean more for Spokane than any
previous year has meant The west is growing at
rapid rate each succeeding Early dreams of poen
tal greatness becoming realities This is period
when immense projects conceived day and
mated the next.


For one thing, the end of the year undoubtedly will
show that this city has population of 100000 people
This population of between 100000 and 100000
within the next five years. In other words when time has
that course, Spokane will have many people
Portland has today. This is something it would be well
for every citizen here to think and realize NOW
Isn't it going to pay you to plan to stay right here and
invest every cent You in Spokane Think how the
city has grown during the past five years Think how
much the value of property will be increased five
years from This is the time to lay the foundations
of your fortune in Spokane


The year is going the practical completion of two
big new roads into Spokane-the Milwaukee and the
North Coast Probably it is going to the completion
of plans for the erection of great union depot and for
the erection of a splendid new city hall.


The year probably will see the adoption of new form
OF municipal government-the commission form 1t will
be big change for the city, and if rightly done will mean
the unfit of civic conditions. If the charter adopted
along present lines it will be the finest model Of municipal
yet submitted to the people of big American
city.


The year will the biggest building development yet,
including the completion of the een-story sky scraper
the biggest hospital in the northwest the probable begin
and the ton of great number of office buildings,
apartments and private dwellings, including four resi-
dences to cost total of 100000.





The year will the founding of several big
featuring businesses the additional development of the
immensely rich tributary country and the possible settle
ment of the terminal rate proposition


Altogether, 1910 will be the most momentous twelve
months in the history of the capital of the Inland Empire
1t will be we'll worth the best efforts of every citizen of
this empire and Of capital to work shoulder to shoulder
to make yet of it's mighty poentalities become real
tiles


Here's to the Greater Spokane and the Greater Inland
Empire.
